patch.value: Track the July 6, 2026 fleet pass: align package metadata with latest pm CLI/SDK and pm-changelog, verify daily release automation, run build/test/audit/package checks with real workspace data where practical, inspect GitHub state, and record privacy/history findings without changing pm-cli itself.
July 6, 2026 fleet readiness pass for the pm package ecosystem.
Package uses current pm CLI/SDK and pm-changelog; release/check scripts pass; pm items capture decisions; no tracked secrets/private data are introduced; GitHub PR/release state is reviewed.

value.author: codex
value.text: PR #18 independent clean verification: npm ci, build, and final test suite passed 50/50 (0 failed, skipped, or todo). Throwaway tracker installed the package; pm --help returned within 20s. Exercised --compress, --include-deps, --max-items, repeatable --section, and context-handoff --format json against linked real items. Default markdown matched origin/main byte-for-byte after removing only Generated timestamp. Found and fixed invalid/format-incompatible --section acceptance, direct-neighbor displacement under --max-items, and O(V×R) dependency indexing in 4e96bbf. Malformed inputs now exit 2 with clean errors and no stack traces. Handled all 6 unreplied bot review comments (6 votes/replies) and requested re-review.
